text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's a special memory that Mejiro McQueen
treasures.

text_block_list.name: Young McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Wow! The history of the Mejiro family is so
wonderful!

text_block_list.name: Young McQueen
text_block_list.text: To think you and Grandfather started it all...

text_block_list.name: Young McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Someday I'll support the family too!

text_block_list.name: Young McQueen
text_block_list.text: Because I'm going to win the Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
McQueen's grandmother, the pillar of the Mejiro
family, smiles affectionately.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Phew...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: My breath control seems to have improved.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: How was it from your point of view, Trainer?
choice_data_list: You clearly have more stamina now!
You clearly have more stamina now!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: You think so too? Thank goodness.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I owe it to your unending patience as you work
with me, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I must maintain this form until the Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After training, I decide to see Mejiro McQueen
back to her dorm.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: On the way there...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Gasp, a wild McQueen appears!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
(It's Gold Ship... If there's anyone here we should
be calling wild, it'd be her. You never know what
she's going to do next.)

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Ta-da, it's Golgol's home delivery service! Take
this!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: What's this?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Oh, this is... a letter from Grandmother?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hmm, yes, I see...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
My, she and Grandfather? Hehe, they're as happy
a couple as ever.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Ah, yes. Why don't we take a stroll and I'll tell
you about it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
There is a large pond in the gardens of the Mejiro
family estate.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I would often walk around its perimeter like this.
choice_data_list:
It sounds like you have treasured memories of
that time.

It sounds like you have treasured memories of
that time.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...I certainly do.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Every single member of my family is an
irreplaceable part of me, and everything I've
done with them is a precious memory.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: And that's why...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I want to win the Tenno Sho, a race the Mejiro
family holds dear.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: (The history of the proud Mejiro family...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
(Everyone who had a hand in writing that history,
starting with Grandmother and Grandfather...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: (I want to show them all...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: (Victory in the Tenno Sho!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The spring Tenno Sho—the race constantly on
Mejiro McQueen's mind.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The most important race of her life is fast
approaching.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Meanwhile...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Phew... I'm back.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Oh, Ryan!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
You're late. It's almost curfew. I was worried
something had happened.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Sorry about that. I just had this thing I needed to
finish.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
When the real thing comes, I wanna be sure I'm
ready...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: For the spring Tenno Sho.
